description_long: This is a retail package of dog snacks branded 'ja!', featuring a predominantly white plastic bag with blue and purple text. The front of the package displays a cheerful dog with a brown and white face, suggesting the product is intended for dogs. The product name 'MINI KAUBARREN mit Geflügel' is prominently printed, indicating the snacks are mini chew bars with poultry flavor. The packaging includes a clear window showing the light-colored chew bars inside, and there are two circular icons near the top right, likely denoting product features or certifications. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on pet appeal and product visibility.
description: A white plastic bag of 'ja!' branded mini dog chew bars with poultry flavor, featuring a dog image and a clear window showing the snacks inside.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the white plastic bag and partial visibility of the dog image and product window.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full 'ja!' logo, product name, dog image, clear snack window, and circular icons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the bag's thickness and partial graphics.
description_view_3: Angled front view highlighting the dog image, product name, and clear snack window, with some curvature of the bag visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'ja!' logo is visible at the top left of the front face, in bold blue lowercase letters.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'mit Geflügel' and an image of light-colored chew bars suggest a poultry flavor.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A large, friendly dog image is present on the front, serving as a mascot-like promotional graphic.
